text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The Takarazuka Kinen has finally arrived.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Grass Wonder appears more upbeat than before
as she exits the waiting room, fully prepared to
race.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Determined to walk her own path, Grass Wonder
heads for the track, where her formidable
opponent Special Week awaits.
